description: Complete HTML examples for complex fundamental-styles components

examples.description: Basic list with simple items
examples.useCase: Use for simple list displays like settings options, feature lists, or basic navigation
examples.accessibilityNotes: Include role='list' on <ul> and role='listitem' on <li>. List must have accessible name via aria-label or aria-labelledby.
examples.html:
• Responsive Design
  • Cross-browser Support
  • Accessibility Features
  • Internationalization

examples.description: Navigation list with icons and selection
examples.useCase: Use for navigation menus, sidebar navigation, or menu items with visual indicators
examples.accessibilityNotes: Use tabindex='0' on interactive items. Mark selected item with is-selected class and aria-current='page'. Icons should have aria-hidden='true'.
examples.html:
• Home
  • Products
  • Customers
  • Settings

examples.description: List with avatars/thumbnails and secondary text
examples.useCase: Use for contact lists, user lists, employee directories, or any list with profile pictures
examples.accessibilityNotes: Avatar should have aria-label. Use fd-list__content wrapper for title and byline structure.
examples.html:
• Sarah Johnson
    Senior Software Engineer
  • Michael Chen
    Product Manager
  • Emily Rodriguez
    UX Designer

examples.description: List with checkbox selection
examples.useCase: Use for multi-select scenarios like batch operations, selecting multiple items for action
examples.accessibilityNotes: Each checkbox needs unique id and aria-label. Use role='listitem' on each list item.

examples.description: List with secondary text and status indicators
examples.useCase: Use for order lists, task lists, or any items with status that needs visual distinction
examples.accessibilityNotes: Object status should contain descriptive text. Use fd-list__content for proper layout structure.
examples.html:
• Order #12345
    Placed on Jan 15, 2024 • Total: $249.99

    Cancelled

examples.description: List with action buttons for each item
examples.useCase: Use for file lists, document management, or any items that need quick actions
examples.accessibilityNotes: Action buttons must have aria-label describing the action and target. Use fd-list__action wrapper.
examples.html:
• Project Proposal.pdf
  • Budget 2024.xlsx
  • Q1 Presentation.pptx

examples.description: Master-detail layout with list in master panel
examples.useCase: Use for email clients, contact management, or any app requiring master-detail navigation pattern
examples.accessibilityNotes: Master panel should have role='complementary' or 'navigation'. Detail panel should have role='main' or 'region' with aria-label.

examples.description: List with group headers
examples.useCase: Use for categorized lists, alphabetically sorted contacts, or items grouped by type
examples.accessibilityNotes: Group headers should use fd-list__group-header. Consider using aria-describedby to associate items with their group.

My Application
JD

Welcome to the Application

This is a complete application shell layout with responsive navigation.

The sidebar navigation collapses on mobile devices and can be toggled using the menu button in the header.
